revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Anrakuju-in]][[fr:Anrakuju-in]][[ja:安楽寿院]][[my:အန်းရခုဂျုအင်း]][[th:อันรากูจูอิง]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Anrakujuin01n3900.jpg|prefecture={{ill|Fushimi-ku|qid=Q1197771|1=Fushimi-ku, Kyoto}}|coordinates={{Coord|34.9525|N|135.75472222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Fushimi, Kyoto, Japan|qq=}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019|qq=}} [[File:Anrakujuin01n3900.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Anrakuju-in in {{ill|Fushimi-ku, Kyoto|en|Fushimi-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1197771|lt=Fushimi|1=Fushimi-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}]] [[File:Anrakujuin Toba-tenno01n3900.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Grave of {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba|1=Emperor Toba}}]] [[File:Anrakujuin Konoe-tenno01n3900.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Grave of {{ill|Emperor Konoe|en|Emperor Konoe|qid=Q373997|lt=Emperor Konoe|1=Emperor Konoe}}]] {{nihongo|'''Anrakuju-in'''|安楽寿院|qq=}} is a {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|qid=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan|1=Buddhist temples in Japan}} in {{ill|Fushimi-ku, Kyoto|en|Fushimi-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1197771|lt=Fushimi|1=Fushimi-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}, built by {{ill|Daijō Tennō|en|Daijō Tennō|qid=Q14303973|lt=former-Emperor|1=Daijō Tennō}} {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Toba|1=Emperor Toba}} in 1137. The temple houses a number of {{ill|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q1188622|lt=Important Cultural Properties|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}} and the emperors {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Toba|1=Emperor Toba}} and {{ill|Emperor Konoe|en|Emperor Konoe|qid=Q373997|lt=Konoe|1=Emperor Konoe}} are buried in the grounds. The {{ill|Ashikaga, Tochigi|en|Ashikaga, Tochigi|qid=Q374477|lt=Ashikaga|1=Ashikaga, Tochigi}} estate from which the {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} derived its name once belonged to Anrakuju-in.<ref>{{cite book |title=Japan's Name Culture: Significance of Names in a Religious, Political and Social Context |author=Plutschow, Herbert E. |publisher=[[Routledge]] |year=1995 |page=119 |ISBN=978-1-873410-42-4|qq=}}</ref> ==Important Cultural Properties== * {{nihongo|painting on silk of [[Amitābha|Amida]] descending with twenty-five {{ill|Bosatsu|en|Bosatsu|qid=Q23925162|lt=Bosatsu|1=Bosatsu}}|絹本著色阿弥陀二十五菩薩来迎図|qq=}} ({{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}})<ref>{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/201/1460 |title=Database of Registered National Cultural Properties |publisher=[[Agency for Cultural Affairs]] |accessdate=7 April 2011 |qq=}}</ref> * {{nihongo|painting on silk of [[:en:Fugen Bosatsu|Fugen Bosatsu]]|絹本著色普賢菩薩像|qq=}} ({{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}})<ref>{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/201/1459 |title=Database of Registered National Cultural Properties |publisher=[[Agency for Cultural Affairs]] |accessdate=7 April 2011 |qq=}}</ref> * {{nihongo|seated wooden statue of [[:en:Amida Nyorai|Amida Nyorai]]|木造阿弥陀如来坐像|qq=}} ({{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}})<ref>{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/201/3515 |title=Database of Registered National Cultural Properties |publisher=[[Agency for Cultural Affairs]] |accessdate=7 April 2011 |qq=}}</ref> * inscribed {{nihongo|[[gorintō]]|五輪塔|1=Gorintō|1=Gorintō|qq=}} (1287)<ref>{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/102/1927 |title=Database of Registered National Cultural Properties |publisher=[[Agency for Cultural Affairs]] |accessdate=7 April 2011 |qq=}}</ref> ==See also== {{Commons Category|Anrakujuin|qq=}} *[[:en:Insei system|Insei system]] *{{ill|Daijō Tennō|en|Daijō Tennō|qid=Q14303973|lt=Daijō Tennō|1=Daijō Tennō}} *{{ill|Sennyū-ji|en|Sennyū-ji|qid=Q1060966|lt=Sennyū-ji|1=Sennyū-ji}} ==References== {{Reflist|qq=}} ==External links== {{in lang|ja|qq=}} [http://www.anraku.or.jp/ Anrakuju-in homepage] {{coord|34|57|09|N|135|45|17|E|region:JP_source:kolossus-jawiki|display=title|qq=}} Anrakuju-in {{Japan-religious-struct-stub|qq=}}
[[en:Anrakuju-in]] <!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Anrakujuin}} [[fr:Anrakuju-in]] [[ja:安楽寿院]] [[my:အန်းရခုဂျုအင်း]] [[th:อันรากูจูอิง]]
{{wikidata link|Q2852420}} [[Category:Important Cultural Properties in Kyoto City]] [[Category:Temples in Fushimi-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:江戸時代の建築]] [[Category:皇室の施設]] [[Category:Temples of Shingon-shū Chisan-ha]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:院政]] [[Category:鳥羽天皇]]
